Where Elegance
Meets the Water.

More than just a shop, we are a destination for Betta lovers. From our state-of-the-art displays to our expert care advice, we provide everything you need to start or grow your aquatic family. Come explore our latest arrivals and see why our Bettas are the centerpiece of the local fish-keeping community.

LOG IN

Our Passion for Aquatic Excellence

At Aquadiction Beta Fishes, we aren't just a shop—we are enthusiasts dedicated to the art of fish keeping. What started as a fascination with the vibrant colors and unique personalities of Bettas has grown into a premier destination for hobbyists. Our mission is to provide every customer with a "living masterpiece" and the knowledge to help it thrive.

120+

Species Carried

1.3K+

Happy Hobbyists

350+

Product Range

5+

Years of Expertise

Everything Your Fish Needs to Thrive

The Aquadiction Difference — when you visit our showroom, you'll see the care we put into every display. We pride ourselves on maintaining the highest standards of cleanliness and health for our livestock, ensuring that when you take a fish home, you're taking home a companion that has been given the best start in life.

Premium Beta Fishes

We specialize in rare and vibrant Betta varieties, each hand-selected and meticulously quarantined to ensure exceptional health and superior fin quality. Find your unique, show-stopping aquatic centerpiece here.

Learn More

High-End Fish Tanks

Explore our curated collection of aquariums, ranging from sleek, space-saving desktop kits perfect for beginners to professional-grade, fully customized setups for the experienced hobbyist.

Learn More

Nutritional Fish Foods

Fuel your Betta's brilliance with our line of specially formulated, high-protein diets. These foods are designed to naturally enhance color, boost energy, and support long-term health.

Learn More

Essential Accessories

We stock every piece of equipment needed for a thriving environment, including reliable heaters and advanced filtration systems, plus natural-looking decor that promotes comfort and mimics the Betta's native habitat.

Learn More
